title: pavonia speciosa var. subpandurata
intro: Pavonia speciosa var. subpandurata, commonly known as Pink Princess Rosemallow, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Pavonia speciosa var. subpandurata include wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving pain, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents, such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins.
